fiscal_tiers.cbdt_reference: CBDT FY2022-23: ~2.24 crore actual income tax payers (~22.4M)
fiscal_tiers.note: direct_tax_million (~38.3)M represents organised formal sector workers whose occupation group is associated with personal income tax or corporate payroll tax. Actual individual taxpayer count (~22.4M per CBDT) is far lower — most workers in even high-income groups earn below the effective ₹12L tax-free threshold.

metadata.nco2015_note: NCO-2015 examples shown for concordance illustration only; full NCO-2015↔NCO-2004 crosswalk requires DGE PDF extraction
metadata.plfs_reference: PLFS 2023-24 Annual Report, NSO/MoSPI: 616M usual-status workers (15+)
caveats: GROUP-LEVEL WORKFORCE COUNTS ARE MODELLED ESTIMATES ±25-35%: distribution derived from PLFS 2023-24 published sector totals. Precise counts require PLFS unit-level microdata (microdata.gov.in catalog 213).
AI SCORES ARE LLM-INFERRED ESTIMATES: not official statistics, not displacement predictions. Scored by Claude using India-specific NCO descriptions per the report's methodology.
HARD STATISTICS (earnings, formality share) are estimated from PLFS 2023-24 aggregate tables and 7th Pay Commission data — not from direct microdata joins.
NCO-2015 examples are illustrative concordance only — not a validated crosswalk. Full crosswalk requires DGE PDF Vol I extraction.
Population base: PLFS 2023-24 reports ~616M usual-status employed (15+); this dataset total is ~623M due to estimation rounding.
Do not use group-level workforce_million figures for any official reporting without PLFS microdata validation.
